_comment: Fixed parsing benchmark — the SAME items every round, so the conformance trend is comparable (unlike the old random per-round sampling). Spans clean / medium / hard-idiom chapters. Each round re-extracts the CURRENT chapter code for these jp, so improving a chapter shows up as a benchmark gain. Grow this set deliberately; don't randomize it.

items.jp: 早く寝るようにしてください
読めば読むほど面白い
今日は休むわけにはいきません
今日は来なくてもいいです
知らぬ人に声をかけられた
本当のことを言うべきだ
